title: eryngium balansae
intro: Eryngium balansae, also known as Balansa's eryngo, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eryngium balansae include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Eryngium balansae can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
